text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Here I go! Even if I'm dragging my feet, I'm still
gonna keep pushing forward, step by step!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(I gotta keep my eyes on the goal and keep
inching forward! Dia will overtake me in a
heartbeat if I get complacent.)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(After all, I debuted first, but she's already
caught up!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, we're waiting for Satono
Diamond to discuss our next partner run, when...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what's taking Dia so long... She's usually
never late for anything.
choice_data_list:
Did she tell you anything that might explain her
tardiness?

Did she tell you anything that might explain her
tardiness?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Um... She did say she had something important to
talk about with her family today, but I've got no
idea what it's about...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita! Sorry I'm late.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hey, Dia! It's no biggie. Did something keep you?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's something that I need to tell the
both of you...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You see... um... I...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I can't run with you anymore, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! What do you mean?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Don't get the wrong idea. I'm not leaving Tracen
Academy or anything like that.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's just impossible for me to run in the same year
with you. My family and I came to that conclusion
after talking with a physician today.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: There's nothing I can do to change things...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wait, do you mean...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's all I needed to hear to understand the
situation. In other words...
choice_data_list: You're not race-ready yet, are you?
You're not race-ready yet, are you?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Correct, I'm not.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When an Horsegirl is race-ready, it means she's in the
stage of her life where she improves rapidly and
her racing capabilities are at their peak.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The timing is different for everyone, though.
Kitasan Black has already entered it, but it seems
Satono Diamond hasn't.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Training with you made me realize that might be
the case.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You were improving day by day while I remained
stagnant. That's when it started to click.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But... But if we're in different years, then we won't
be able to run in the Satsuki Sho or the Derby
together...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Isn't there anything we can do, Trainer? There has
to be a way we can run together...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think long and hard, but can't come up with
anything. I look at Satono Diamond.
choice_data_list:
You waited as long as you could, didn't you,
Dia?

You waited as long as you could, didn't you,
Dia?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I did... I wanted nothing more than to debut at
the same time as Kita.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But it's not possible to wait any longer...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If I'm not race-ready now, then there's no way I'll
be ready in time to debut. And if this is the case...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I should stop training in preparation for my debut
and go back to basic training for now.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If I overwork myself and get injured, the Satono
family's dream of winning a G1 race for the first
time would go down with me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I can't possibly risk that happening, which is why I
decided to postpone my debut to next year.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That was my family's consensus.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So are you doing this just because your family
told you to?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not it, Kita. It's because I know I have
to.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Our friendship means the world to me... But just
like how you want to make everyone smile,
there's something important I must do too.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want to stay your friend while protecting what's
important to me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If our positions were reversed, I wouldn't want
you to sacrifice what's important to you for my
sake, either.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: So please. Please understand my situation.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Okay. I got it!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
This is exactly why I wanted to be friends with
you, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But... it does look like I'll have to tough it out.
Even though it'll be lonely out on the track
without you running after me...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Do you really think I won't be running after you?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What do you mean? I thought we won't be
running in the same races together?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but think of the bigger picture. Imagine
you're looking at things from a bird's-eye view,
high in the sky.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You start off running just a little before I do. Then
afterwards, I follow in your exact footsteps.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It'll still look like I'm running after you from that
perspective, right?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh... You are right! Great thinking, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: It'll be just like back then...

text_block_list.name: Young Dia
text_block_list.text: Kita! Wait for me!

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Dia! This way! Watch your step and be
careful not to trip!

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
Just walk where I walk, and you'll be okay! Get
ready to see something you've never seen before!

text_block_list.name: Young Dia
text_block_list.text: Whoa... This is amazing!

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
Right? I'll keep showing you lots and lots of sights
that you can't see from your home! Always and
forever!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I hope you'll still be friends with me, Kita. I know
we'll have different training schedules and won't
get to see each other as often, but...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I promise I'll always keep you in my sights. I'll be
cheering for you while running after you.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Dia... Of course! We've never actually had to take
different paths before up until now...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But I promise you! I'll work hard with Trainer to
pave the way for you, just like the big sister I am!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The path that the two friends have always
trekked on together now diverges into different
routes. But even so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I believe that their time apart will make them
both stronger in the end. But for now, Kitasan
Black must walk alone.
